message:
Add token extraction module for agent session usage tracking

Introduce a new token_extraction submodule in the connectors layer that
provides token usage estimation and extraction from agent session data:

- Add token_extraction.rs with types: ExtractedTokenUsage, ModelInfo,
  TokenDataSource for structured token usage reporting
- Implement extract_claude_code_tokens and extract_codex_tokens for
  provider-specific token extraction from session JSON/JSONL data
- Add extract_tokens_for_agent unified entry point that dispatches to
  the correct provider-specific extractor
- Add estimate_tokens_from_content for heuristic token estimation when
  structured data is unavailable
- Add normalize_model for canonicalizing model name strings
- Wire up module declaration and public re-exports in connectors/mod.rs
- Add crate-root re-exports in lib.rs behind the connectors feature
  flag for convenient downstream access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
